assertions.issues: 25 of 35 text files differ. Primary categories: (1) JXR vs JPG image format — Go outputs .jxr images without JXR-to-JPEG conversion; (2) Different image resize dimensions — Go uses base KFX dimensions while Calibre uses HD variants; (3) Dropcap span class ordering differences in 2 files; (4) Structural element wrapping differences in 1 file; (5) CSS class property differences.

summary: Assertion VAL-CROSS-004 FAILED: SecretsCrown produces 25 differing text files (out of 35 total), not the required 0. The differences are primarily due to JXR vs JPG image format (Go outputs .jxr, Calibre converts to .jpg), different image dimensions (Go uses base KFX dimensions while Calibre uses HD variants), dropcap class ordering issues in 2 files, and structural/CSS differences in a few files.
